name: SubdivideLayer
description: Subdivides a layer definition into child layers by thickness. Pass the output (along with the parent layer) to CT_Panel's 'layers' input.

inputParameters.name: thicknesses
inputParameters.description: List of sublayer thicknesses (from exterior face). Must sum to <= parent thickness.

outputParameters.name: sublayers
outputParameters.description: List of child Layer definitions with paths derived from parent.
